channel.title: National Cyber Security Centre Finland (NCSC-FI) — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by National Cyber Security Centre Finland (NCSC-FI) (ncsc-fi).

item.title: CVE-2026-6265 · 7.3 HIGH — Local Privilege Escalation in Cerberus FTP Server =< 2025.4.2
item.description: Insecure preserved inherited permissions vulnerability in Cerberus FTP Server on Windows allows Privilege Escalation.This issue has been resolved in Cerberus FTP Server: 2026.1

item.title: CVE-2025-15626 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Authenticated user can bypass authorization in Ribblr - Crochet & Knitting iOS application
item.description: Authenticated user can bypass authorization in Ribblr - Crochet & Knitting iOS application

item.title: CVE-2025-15625 · 9.5 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Unauthenticated execution of arbitrary SQL queries in Sparx Pro Cloud Server
item.description: Unauthenticated user is able to execute arbitrary SQL commands in Sparx Pro Cloud Server database in certain cases.

item.title: CVE-2025-15624 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Plaintext Storage of a Password in Sparx Pro Cloud Server.
item.description: Plaintext Storage of a Password vulnerability in Sparx Systems Pty Ltd. Sparx Pro Cloud Server. In a setup where OpenID is used as the primary method of authentication to authenticate to Sparx EA, Pro Cloud Server creates local passwords to the users…

item.title: CVE-2025-15623 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Sparx Pro Cloud Server reveals sensitive information to an unauthenticated user
item.description: Exposure of Private Personal Information to an Unauthorized Actor, : Exposure of Sensitive System Information to an Unauthorized Control Sphere vulnerability in Sparx Systems Pty Ltd. Sparx Pro Cloud Server. Unauthenticated user can retrieve database…

item.title: CVE-2025-15622 · 6.2 MEDIUM — Sparx Enterprise Architect Client reveals plaintext OAuth2 client secret
item.description: Insufficiently Protected Credentials vulnerability in Sparx Systems Pty Ltd. Sparx Enterprise Architect. Client reveals plaintext OAuth2 client secretDesktop client decodes the secret and uses the plaintext secret to exchange it into an access and id…

item.title: CVE-2025-15621 · 5.7 MEDIUM — Sparx Enterprise Architect Client does not verify the receiver of OAuth2 credentials during OpenID authentication
item.description: Insufficiently Protected Credentials in Sparx Systems Pty Ltd. Sparx Enterprise Architect. Client does not verify the receiver of OAuth2 credentials during OpenID authentication

item.title: CVE-2025-15554 · 6 MEDIUM — Admin Passwords Cached by Browsers in Truesec LAPSWebUI
item.description: Browser caching of LAPS passwords in Truesec’s LAPSWebUI before version 2.4 allows an attacker with access to a workstation to escalate their privileges via disclosure of local admin passwords.

item.title: CVE-2025-15553 · 6 MEDIUM — Insecure Logout Functionality in Truesec LAPSWebUI
item.description: Non-working logout functionality in Truesec’s LAPSWebUI before version 2.4 allows an attacker with access to a workstation to escalate their privileges via disclosure of local admin password.

item.title: CVE-2025-15552 · 6 MEDIUM — Long Session Lifetime in Truesec LAPSWebUI
item.description: Insufficient Session Expiration in Truesec’s LAPSWebUI before version 2.4 allows an attacker with access to a workstation to escalate their privileges via disclosure of local admin password.

item.title: CVE-2026-3315 · 5.8 MEDIUM — Local Privilege Escalation Due to Writable Executable in Privileged Visionline Service Path
item.description: Incorrect Default Permissions, : Execution with Unnecessary Privileges, : Incorrect Permission Assignment for Critical Resource vulnerability in ASSA ABLOY Visionline on Windows allows Configuration/Environment Manipulation.This issue affects Visionl…

item.title: CVE-2025-15595 · 5.7 MEDIUM — Privilege escalation via dll hijacking in Inno Setup
item.description: Privilege escalation via dll hijacking in Inno Setup 6.2.1 and ealier versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-2731 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Unauthenticated RCE in Dynamicweb 9 and Dynamicweb 8
item.description: Path traversal and content injection in JobRunnerBackground.aspx in DynamicWeb 8 (all) and 9 (<9.19.7 and <9.20.3) allows unauthenticated attackers to execute code via simple web requests

item.title: CVE-2025-15577 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Valmet DNA Web server arbitrary file read access
item.description: An unauthenticated attacker can exploit this vulnerability by manipulating URL to achieve arbitrary file read access.This issue affects Valmet DNA Web Tools: C2022 and older.

item.title: CVE-2026-1680 · 7.1 HIGH — Local Privilege Escalation in Local Admin Service
item.description: Improper access control in the WCF endpoint in Edgemo (now owned by Danoffice IT) Local Admin Service 1.2.7.23180 on Windows allows a local user to escalate their privileges to local administrator via direct communication with the LocalAdminService.e…

item.title: CVE-2025-9427 · 8.4 HIGH — Admin reflected XSS
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation (XSS or 'Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in Lemonsoft WordPress add on allows Cross-Site Scripting (XSS).This issue affects WordPress add on: 2025.7.1.

item.title: CVE-2025-10009 · 8.6 HIGH — Authenticated admin RCE in Invoice Ninja
item.description: Incorrect handling of uploaded files in the admin "Restore" function in Invoice Ninja <= 5.11.72 allows attackers with admin credentials to execute arbitrary code on the server via uploaded .php files.

item.title: CVE-2025-4377 · 8.3 HIGH — Path traversal vulnerability in Sparx Pro Cloud Server WebEA webconfig in logview.php
item.description: Improper Limitation of a Pathname caused a Path Traversal vulnerability in Sparx Systems Pro Cloud Server. This vulnerability is present in logview.php and it allows reading arbitrary files on the filesystem. Logview is accessible on Pro Cloud Server…

item.title: CVE-2025-4376 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Cross-Site Scripting vulnerability in Model Search in Pro Cloud Server's WebEA
item.description: Improper Input Validation vulnerability in Sparx Systems Pro Cloud Server's WebEA model search field allows Cross-Site Scripting (XSS). This issue affects Pro Cloud Server: earlier than 6.0.165.

item.title: CVE-2025-4375 · 6.9 MEDIUM — Cross-Site Request Forgery vulnerability in Pro Cloud Server's WebEA
item.description: Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) vulnerability in Sparx Systems Pro Cloud Server allows Cross-Site Request Forgery to perform Session Hijacking. Cross-Site Request Forgery is present at the whole application but it can be used to change the Pro Clou…

item.title: CVE-2025-0416 · 8.9 HIGH — Valmet DNA Local privilege escalation through insecure DCOM configuration
item.description: Local privilege escalation through insecure DCOM configuration in Valmet DNA versions prior to C2023. The DCOM object Valmet DNA Engineering has permissions that allow it to run commands as a user with the SeImpersonatePrivilege privilege. The SeImpe…

item.title: CVE-2025-0417 · 7 HIGH — Valmet DNA Lack of protection against brute force attacks
item.description: Lack of protection against brute force attacks in Valmet DNA visualization in DNA Operate. The possibility to make an arbitrary number of login attempts without any rate limit gives an attacker an increased chance of guessing passwords and then perfo…

item.title: CVE-2025-0418 · 5.2 MEDIUM — Valmet DNA user passwords in plain text
item.description: Valmet DNA user passwords in plain text. This practice poses a security risk as attackers who gain access to local project data can read the passwords.

item.title: CVE-2024-12867 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Server-Side Request Forgery in Arctic Hub URL Mapper allows an unauthenticated remote attacker to exfiltrate and modify configurations and data
item.description: Server-Side Request Forgery in URL Mapper in Arctic Security's Arctic Hub versions 3.0.1764-5.6.1877 allows an unauthenticated remote attacker to exfiltrate and modify configurations and data.
